title: Soured Cabbage and Norwegian Salmon Delight
description: A refreshing and flavorful dish combining the tanginess of soured cabbage with the richness of Norwegian salmon.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Place the salmon on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the salmon in the oven for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, sauté the chopped fermented black beans in a pan with a little oil until fragrant.
Add the sliced soured cabbage to the pan and cook until slightly caramelized.
Wrap the cooked salmon in cabbage leaves and serve with the sautéed cabbage mixture.
Top with a dollop of aerated mousse and serve immediately.
